lib/features/profile/data/models/local_u.description: Local data model for user profiles with offline-first sync tracking
key_features: JSON serialization for sync queue storage

lib/features/profile/data/repositories/p.changes: Extended OfflineAwareRepository, implemented local/remote operations, sync queuing
key_features: Extends OfflineAwareRepository<Profile, LocalUserProfileModel, Map<String, dynamic>, Map<String, dynamic>>

lib/features/profile/domain/repositories.changes: Updated interface to return RepositoryOperationResult for write operations

lib/features/core/infrastructure/graphql.changes: Updated getUserProfile query, added getCurrentUserProfile, createUserProfile, deleteUserProfile mutations, updateUserPreferences, updateUserInterests, toggleProfileVisibility mutations

lib/features/profile/presentation/provid.changes: Updated profileRepositoryProvider to inject offline dependencies, ProfileDomainNotifier to handle RepositoryOperationResult

patterns_discovered: Consistent offline-first pattern implementation across repositories (ProfileRepositoryImpl follows TripRepositoryImpl and JournalRepositoryImpl patterns)
Generic repository pattern using OfflineAwareRepository<Domain, LocalModel, RemoteParams, RemoteResult>
Optimistic UI updates with local database writes first
Sync queue management for offline operations
JSON serialization for complex data (interests, preferences)
Dependency injection using GetIt with separate offline module
gotchas_discovered: Field mapping differences between GraphQL queries and domain entities (firstName/lastName → displayName, profilePictureUrl → avatarUrl)
Complex data serialization requirements (List<String> interests and Map<String, dynamic> preferences stored as JSON strings in database)
Sync state tracking with multiple boolean flags (isSynced, hasPendingChanges)
Dependency injection setup requiring multiple DAO registrations
Network awareness and sync queue handling complexity

approach_outcome.strategy: Systematic offline-first adaptation following established patterns
approach_outcome.consistency: Excellent consistency with previous repository implementations
approach_outcome.documentation: Comprehensive documentation and debug logging included
approach_outcome.error_handling: Robust error handling throughout the implementation
